---
title: "NC-Style Multi-Omics Integration Figure"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{NC-Style Multi-Omics Integration Figure}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, eval=FALSE}
library(readr)
library(multiomfigR)
library(ncfigR)

embedding <- read_tsv(system.file("extdata/integration_embedding.tsv", package = "multiomfigR"))
metrics <- read_tsv(system.file("extdata/modality_metrics.tsv", package = "multiomfigR"))
validation <- read_tsv(system.file("extdata/cross_dataset_validation.tsv", package = "multiomfigR"))
links <- read_tsv(system.file("extdata/feature_links.tsv", package = "multiomfigR"))
programs <- read_tsv(system.file("extdata/pathway_programs.tsv", package = "multiomfigR"))

fig <- compose_multiomics_figure(embedding, metrics, validation, links, programs)
export_figure_bundle(fig, "multiomics_overview", out_dir = "figures/exports", width = 7, height = 5)
```
